Space layout: 6 shop units + food court + common area + restrooms + loading bay
Description: A strip mall / supermarket located in Guangzhou, China. The building footprint is approximately 68.3 m (east-west) by 34.2 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 315 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 3500.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 2333.3 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 4.5 m. The building is divided into 14 thermal zones in total (about 9 per floor). Typical space layout: 6 shop units + food court + common area + restrooms + loading bay. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
